checked_off_summary: Apr-May 2026: All PRs from prior runs merged/closed. Jun 2026: PR #357 (footer space fix) merged. Issue #355 closed.
maintainer_preferences: Do NOT move helpers to new packages (e.g. model/walk helpers). PR #337 was closed as known antipattern. Keep refactors within-package only. Maintainer actively implementing refactors from #324-335 series. Title feature: default hidden, no text; one flag --title TEXT only. Legend config: no migration needed (alpha), no override semantics (YAGNI).
